methods.name: WinUI.new
methods.desc: Initializes the main application window with Windows 11 Fluent design. Supports dragging and custom themes.

methods.name: Window:CreateTab
methods.desc: Adds a new navigation category to the left sidebar. Supports Fluent icons via Asset IDs.

methods.name: Tab:Button
methods.desc: Creates a professional button with a modern ripple effect and hover animations.
methods.example:
Tab:Button({
    Title = "Execute Script",
    Desc = "Runs the main logic",
    Callback = function()
        print("Clicked!")
    end
})

methods.name: Tab:Toggle
methods.desc: Adds a smooth switch for boolean settings (on/off). Returns the new state to the callback.
methods.example:
Tab:Toggle({
    Title = "Auto-Farm",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        print("Status: ", state)
    end
})

methods.name: Tab:Slider
methods.desc: Adds a draggable slider to control numeric values like WalkSpeed or JumpPower.
methods.example:
Tab:Slider({
    Title = "WalkSpeed",
    Min = 16,
    Max = 150,
    Default = 16,
    Callback = function(value)
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = value
    end
})

methods.name: Window:Notify
methods.desc: Sends a modern Windows 11 style toast notification to the user.
